item.name: Doyen's Clan Mark Log
item.description: A list of highly elite marks documented by the log's owner. It is unclear whether the marks within were ever slain by said owner, but the overuse of modifiers such as “ghastly,” “terrifying,” and “beyond all horrors that haunt the sleeping mind” in their descriptions suggests perhaps not. Though such documents were once considered highly valuable, demand has dried up and they are now essentially worthless.
